# OutfitKit
> CSS component library + Jinja macros for server-rendered web apps.

OutfitKit uses a composable CSS API:

- component: `.btn`, `.card`, `.modal`, `.badge`
- variant: `.primary`, `.danger`, `.success`, `.neutral`, ...
- size: `.2xs`, `.xs`, `.sm`, `.md`, `.lg`, `.xl`, `.2xl`
- style: `.outline`, `.ghost`, `.soft`, `.link`

Example:

```html
<button class="btn primary lg outline">Save</button>
<div class="modal soft" style="--max-width: 40rem;"></div>
```

## Quick start
- [README](https://github.com/OutfitKit/outfitkit/blob/main/README.md)
- [Live showcase](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/)
- [Repository](https://github.com/OutfitKit/outfitkit)
- [Design system](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/design-system.html)

## CSS
- [outfitkit.css](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/OutfitKit/outfitkit@latest/css/outfitkit.css): canonical source bundle.
- [outfitkit.min.css](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/OutfitKit/outfitkit@latest/dist/outfitkit.min.css): production bundle.
- [outfitkit.ok.min.css](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/OutfitKit/outfitkit@latest/dist/outfitkit.ok.min.css): legacy prefixed compatibility snapshot.

## Python package
- [outfitkit on PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/outfitkit/)
- package exposes `TEMPLATES_DIR`, `register_globals(env)` as a compatibility no-op, `css_url(version=None, minified=True)`, `theme_url(name)`

## Themes
- themes combine `data-theme` (`erplora`, `erplora-light`) with optional `data-template`
- global tokens are unprefixed: `--bg`, `--brand`, `--space-4`, `--radius-md`, ...

## Components
- buttons & status: button, badge, avatar, icon, tags, progress, rating, chip, pill, theme_toggle, back_pill, back_btn
- surfaces & layout: card, feature_card, module_card, pricing_card, benefit_card, panel, app_shell, mobile_shell, sidebar_nav, topbar, menubar, tabbar, tabs, breadcrumbs, accordion
- overlays: modal, drawer, action_sheet, toast, banner, tooltip, context_menu, system_overlays
- data: table, datatable, virtual_scroll, infinite_scroll, reorder, list, tree, timeline, stat, stats, kpi, chart, sparkline, empty, states
- forms: field, input, textarea, select, checkbox, radio, toggle, slider, segmented, search, autocomplete, datepicker, timepicker, colorpicker, otp, stepper, richtext
- touch / mobile: swipe, pull_to_refresh, action_sheet
- marketing / public: page_hero, prose, section, navbar, footer
- verticals: calendar, kanban, chat, pos, kds, numpad, pinpad, pay, invoice, receipt, manufacturing, hr_card, gallery, audio_player, video_player

## What's new (v1.2)
- `feature-card` + `icon-box` — feature/category card pattern (Stripe/Linear-style) with icon-box, variants `.compact / .horizontal / .elevated / .flat / .glass / .interactive`
- `module-card` — marketplace card with author, meta chips, footer price
- `pricing-card` — pricing tiers with `.featured` glow + `.compact`
- `benefit-card` — gradient CTA card with `.success / .warn / .info / .solid / .left`
- `page-hero` — internal page hero with `.dotted / .grid-bg / .left`
- `prose` — long-form typography (legal, docs, blog) with `.compact / .wide / .full`
- `chip` + `.pill` — semantic tags/filters with `.success / .warn / .danger / .info / .neutral / .outline / .solid / .active` and sizes `.sm / .lg`
- `theme-toggle` — sun/moon button driven by `[data-theme]`
- `back-pill` — fixed floating back button for inner pages
- `segmented` — touch-first segmented control with `.sm / .full`
- `swipe` — iOS-style swipe-to-reveal list (Pointer Events, mouse fallback)
- `pull-to-refresh` — touch gesture wrapper; emits `ptr:refresh` event
- `reorder` — drag-and-drop list with handle, emits `reorder:change`
- `virtual-scroll` — virtualized list (10 000+ rows), `data-vs-rows` JSON, custom `<template>`
- `infinite-scroll` — `IntersectionObserver` sentinel; emits `iscroll:more`
- `action-sheet` — iOS/Ionic bottom sheet with `.destructive / .primary / .row / .bar`
- `.center-narrow / .center-medium / .center-wide` utilities for marketing layout
- ERPlora theme refresh — neutral cool palette (no warm/brown), Space Grotesk + JetBrains Mono, light is the default theme, dark via `data-theme="erplora"`
- `--tap-min / --tap-comfort / --tap-tight` semantic tokens (iOS HIG 44 px minimum)
